assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Recommends Regular channel instead, explicitly stating 'Use Regular channel (not Extended)' and explaining why Regular is preferred over Extended

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends using '--add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades' and explains it 'allows CP security patches, blocks all disruptive changes'

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Configures a specific weekly Sunday maintenance window with '--maintenance-window-recurrence "FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SU"' from 6-10 AM

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Provides separate node pool configurations for 'Training Pool (H100s)' and 'System/Inference Pool (no GPUs)' with detailed explanations of their distinct purposes

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Sets '--enable-autoupgrade=false' on H100 training pool and provides detailed steps for manual upgrades 'Between Training Runs (Planned Upgrades)'

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Includes checkpointing guidance in emergency procedures with 'kubectl exec training-pod -- /save_checkpoint.sh' and mentions 'wait for natural completion' during upgrades

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Includes a dedicated 'GPU Driver Compatibility' section with commands to create staging cluster and verify CUDA version compatibility before production upgrades

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: Includes 'High-Performance Networking Configuration' section with GPUDirect-TCPX/RDMA setup and 'Networking verification post-upgrade' commands to test RDMA functionality after upgrades
